title: Amateur Naturalism and Activities of Nature and Wildlife Organizations: Observation Notes 2006-2011
description: The dataset consists of observation notes made about meetings and events held by amateur naturalist societies, and a few other nature-related events in Finland. Observations were made in the meetings of Tampere Botanical Association, Tampere Entomological Society and Tampere Mycological Society, in the events and seminars organised by Pirkanmaa Ornithological Society and the Natural History Museum of Tampere, as well as in the publication event of a bird atlas. Altogether, 11 meetings or events
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
